title: Smudgy Extension
content: Browser Extension is out ! (download the new Files)

title: v0.43.9
content: added bots Re-added sk8 knife only map Changing settings will no longer expose players Added left-handed camera setting Bots can now be added in private and custom rooms Bots will join empty rooms until players join Bots will join or leave to balance team modes A helper bot will replace a player leaving a ranked game Added street 1v1 map AAdded story parkour map added tenebris parkour map
